title: Add Upcoming Attractions Timeline (2027-2029) with AI-Generated Images

requirements.text: Create a new UpcomingAttractionsSection component that displays future park expansions in timeline format showing 2027, 2028, and 2029 attractions grouped by year
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays attractions organized by opening year (2027, 2028, 2029)
Each year grouping shows all attractions scheduled for that year
Section uses consistent styling with existing Section components
Component is added to home page alongside other sections

requirements.text: Add Starr Eyes restaurant to 2027 attractions with description as an upscale horror-themed dining experience
acceptanceCriteria: Restaurant appears under 2027 section
Includes name 'Starr Eyes' and description
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

requirements.text: Add Lone Starr stunt show to 2028 attractions with description of action-packed live stunt performances

quotes: Lone Starr stunt show coming soon 2028

acceptanceCriteria: Show appears under 2028 section
Includes name 'Lone Starr' and description of stunt show
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

requirements.text: Add Chaos Breaths themed land to 2029 attractions as a major new land featuring multiple shows and character meet-and-greets

quotes: Chaos breaths will have two new shows
meet and greets from all costume characters

acceptanceCriteria: Land appears under 2029 section with name 'Chaos Breaths'
Description mentions it's a new themed land with shows and character interactions
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

requirements.text: Add Fire over Water show as a featured attraction within Chaos Breaths land with description of water and fire special effects spectacle

quotes: one is called Fire over water

acceptanceCriteria: Show is listed as part of Chaos Breaths land attractions
Name is 'Fire over Water'
Description highlights water and fire effects
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

requirements.text: Add Dragon Lair show as a featured attraction within Chaos Breaths land with description of dragon-themed performance
acceptanceCriteria: Show is listed as part of Chaos Breaths land attractions
Name is 'Dragon Lair'
Description features dragon theming
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

requirements.text: Add character meet-and-greet information to Chaos Breaths land indicating all costume characters will be available for photo opportunities

quotes: meet and greets from all costume characters

acceptanceCriteria: Chaos Breaths land description or card mentions character meet-and-greets
Text indicates all costume characters will be present

requirements.text: Add Under the Sea live show with description of pyrotechnic water show and include a Six Flags America easter egg reference in the description

quotes: Under the Sea will have a live show with pyro
Yes a connection from six flags America Easter egg

acceptanceCriteria: Show appears in upcoming attractions with name 'Under the Sea'
Description mentions live show with pyrotechnic effects
Description includes subtle reference or easter egg to Six Flags America
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

requirements.text: Render all generated AI images for upcoming attractions as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated directory
acceptanceCriteria: All attraction images load from frontend/public/assets/generated
Images display in attraction cards with proper sizing
Error handling for missing images is in place

constraints: All AI-generated images must use cartoon style mixed with horror and graffiti aesthetics
Maintain existing frontend structure and component patterns
Do not modify existing shows or attractions data
nonGoals: Creating detail pages for individual upcoming attractions
Adding backend storage for upcoming attractions timeline
Implementing booking or reservation features for future attractions

required: Upscale horror-themed restaurant exterior with neon stars and eerie dining ambiance in cartoon style mixed with horror and graffiti (starr-eyes-restaurant.dim_800x600.png)
Action-packed stunt show with performers doing dangerous tricks in a western horror setting, cartoon style with horror and graffiti elements (lone-starr-stunt-show.dim_800x600.png)
Large themed land entrance with chaotic breath effects and dark atmosphere, cartoon style mixed with horror and graffiti (chaos-breaths-land.dim_1000x600.png)
Water and fire special effects show with dramatic flames over water surface, cartoon style with horror and graffiti aesthetic (fire-over-water-show.dim_800x600.png)
Dragon-themed show stage with menacing dragon presence in lair setting, cartoon style mixed with horror and graffiti (dragon-lair-show.dim_800x600.png)

Underwater ocean scene with sea creatures and pyrotechnic effects bursting from water, cartoon style with horror and graffiti elements and subtle Six Flags America reference (under-the-sea-show.dim_800x600.png)
